mapper.select: SELECT id, `order-no`, `user-id`, `total-amount`, `pay-amount`, `pay-status`, `order-status`, remark, `address-id`, receiver, `receiver-phone`, `create-time` FROM t_order ORDER BY `create-time` DESC
SELECT id, `order-no`, `user-id`, `total-amount`, `pay-amount`, `pay-status`, `order-status`, remark, `address-id`, receiver, `receiver-phone`, `create-time` FROM t_order WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, `order-no`, `user-id`, `total-amount`, `pay-amount`, `pay-status`, `order-status`, remark, `address-id`, receiver, `receiver-phone`, `create-time` FROM t_order WHERE `user-id` = #{userId} ORDER BY `create-time` DESC

SELECT id, `order-no`, `user-id`, `total-amount`, `pay-amount`, `pay-status`, `order-status`, remark, `address-id`, receiver, `receiver-phone`, `create-time` FROM t_order WHERE `order-status` = #{orderStatus} ORDER BY `create-time` DESC

SELECT id, `order-no`, `user-id`, `total-amount`, `pay-amount`, `pay-status`, `order-status`, remark, `address-id`, receiver, `receiver-phone`, `create-time` FROM t_order WHERE `order-no` = #{orderNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order (`order-no`, `user-id`, `total-amount`, `pay-amount`, `pay-status`, `order-status`, remark, `address-id`, receiver, `receiver-phone`, `create-time`) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{payStatus}, #{orderStatus}, #{remark}, #{addressId}, #{receiver}, #{receiverPhone}, #{createTime})
